name: matchingReceiptValidate

testSteps.description: Given that I'm logged into 'Match Receipt' page

children.description: When i open page from sidebar menu: {Accounts Payable,Unbilled PO Receipts,Matching Receipt}

testSteps.description: Then the 'Match Receipt' page and its contents should show up
When I clear the 'Business Unit' field

exception.message:
Expected condition failed: waiting for number of elements found by By.cssSelector: .loading-container to be less than "1". Current number: "1" (tried for 300 second(s) with 100 milliseconds interval)
Build info: version: '3.141.59', revision: 'e82be7d358', time: '2018-11-14T08:17:03'

testSteps.description: Then the invoice voucher search results should show up
When I click 'See More' button from the first invoice voucher
When I click the checkbox of the first invoice row
When I click on 'Match Receipt' button
Then the 'Payment Information' form and its contents should show up
When I set the 'Invoice Number' to 'CUPR/C1/hDhF742R'
Then the 'Payment Amount' form and its contents should show up
Then the 'Matching Receipt Successfully Created' modal should show up
When I click on 'Exit' button from modal
